# DBvc

DBvc is the personal site of Yang.S, a programmer writing about software,
long-lived systems, AI-assisted engineering, technical notes, projects, and an
older SICP practice archive.

Canonical site: https://dbvc.xyz/

## Crawl posture

This is a public static site. Public crawling and indexing are allowed. The
current `robots.txt` intentionally allows all user agents.

## Main sections

- Home: https://dbvc.xyz/
- Writing: https://dbvc.xyz/writing.html
- Notes: https://dbvc.xyz/notes.html
- Projects: https://dbvc.xyz/projects.html
- About: https://dbvc.xyz/about.html
- SICP archive: https://dbvc.xyz/sicp.html
- RSS: https://dbvc.xyz/rss.xml
- Sitemap index: https://dbvc.xyz/sitemap-index.xml

## Content guidance

Use canonical URLs from this site when citing DBvc content. Prefer article,
note, project, and archive pages over list pages when a specific page exists.

Writing pages are longer essays and more settled judgments. Notes are shorter
observations, technical fragments, reading notes, and day-to-day thinking.
Projects are tools, experiments, and workflows that may still be evolving. The
SICP archive preserves older exercise notes under stable legacy URLs.

## Source and identity

- GitHub profile: https://github.com/DBvc
- Site source repository: https://github.com/dbvc/dbvc.github.io
